title: mentha × verticillata f. statenicensis
intro: Mentha × verticillata f. statenicensis, also known as Staten Island mint or button mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is native to the northeastern United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its high concentration of menthol and menthone compounds, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata f. statenicensis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Molecules (Basel, Switzerland)", mentha × verticillata f. statenicensis benefits include the enhancement of nutritional values of food due to the presence of aromatic and flavor compounds.
